subcodes.first_line: We bear witness that thou hast turned unto God and departed from thy dwelling place at His command, and traversed both land and sea [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نشهد بانک اقبلت الی الله و خرجت عن مقرک بامر من عنده و قطعت البر و البحر
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @goodly deeds; actions, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
